mapper.insert: INSERT INTO woorido.posts ( id, challenge_id, created_by, title, content, category, is_notice, is_pinned, like_count, comment_count, view_count, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{challengeId}, #{createdBy}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{isNotice}, #{isPinned}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{viewCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, challenge_id, created_by, title, content, category, is_notice, is_pinned, like_count, comment_count, view_count, created_at, updated_at FROM woorido.posts WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT p.id, p.challenge_id as CHALLENGE_ID, p.created_by as CREATED_BY, p.title, p.content, p.category, p.is_notice as IS_NOTICE, p.is_pinned as IS_PINNED, p.like_count as LIKE_COUNT, p.comment_count as COMMENT_COUNT, p.view_count as VIEW_COUNT, p.created_at as CREATED_AT, p.updated_at as UPDATED_AT, u.nickname as AUTHOR_NICKNAME, u.profile_image_url as AUTHOR_PROFILE_IMAGE FROM woorido.posts p JOIN woorido.users u ON p.created_by = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE woorido.posts SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE id = #{postId} AND like_count > 0
UPDATE woorido.posts SET comment_count = comment_count - 1 WHERE id = #{postId} AND comment_count > 0
UPDATE woorido.posts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = #{category}, is_notice = #{isNotice}, is_pinned = #{isPinned}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE woorido.posts SET is_pinned = #{isPinned}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{postId}
UPDATE woorido.posts SET is_pinned = 'N', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND is_notice = 'Y' AND is_pinned = 'Y' AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT id as FILE_ID, image_url as FILE_URL, display_order FROM woorido.post_images WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY display_order ASC

SELECT ID, CHALLENGE_ID, CREATED_BY, TITLE, CONTENT, CATEGORY, IS_NOTICE, IS_PINNED, LIKE_COUNT, COMMENT_COUNT, VIEW_COUNT, CREATED_AT, AUTHOR_NICKNAME, AUTHOR_PROFILE_IMAGE, IS_LIKED FROM ( SELECT A.ID, A.CHALLENGE_ID, A.CREATED_BY, A.TITLE, A.CONTENT, A.CATEGORY, A.IS_NOTICE, A.IS_PINNED, A.LIKE_COUNT, A.COMMENT_COUNT, A.VIEW_COUNT, A.CREATED_AT, A.AUTHOR_NICKNAME, A.AUTHOR_PROFILE_IMAGE, A.IS_LIKED, ROWNUM RNUM FROM ( SELECT p.id as ID, p.challenge_id as CHALLENGE_ID, p.created_by as CREATED_BY, p.title as TITLE, p.content as CONTENT, p.category as CATEGORY, p.is_notice as IS_NOTICE, p.is_pinned as IS_PINNED, p.like_count as LIKE_COUNT, p.comment_count as COMMENT_COUNT, p.view_count as VIEW_COUNT, p.created_at as CREATED_AT, u.nickname as AUTHOR_NICKNAME, u.profile_image_url as AUTHOR_PROFILE_IMAGE, (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM woorido.post_likes pl WHERE pl.post_id = p.id AND pl.user_id = #{userId}) as IS_LIKED FROM woorido.posts p JOIN woorido.users u ON p.created_by = u.id
ORDER BY p.is_pinned DESC, ${sortColumn} ${sortOrder} ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RNUM > #{startRow}
